final:
module divider_4bit (
    input [3:0] dividend_inverted,
    input [3:0] divisor,
    output reg [3:0] quotient,
    output reg [3:0] remainder
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (divisor != 0) begin
            quotient = dividend_inverted / divisor;
            remainder = dividend_inverted % divisor;
        end else begin
            quotient = 4'b0000; // Undefined behavior for division by zero
            remainder = dividend_inverted; // Return the dividend_inverted as remainder
        end
    end
endmodule
